raw_calls.callee:
await Folder.find({ userId: profile.id })
    .select("_id name slug parentId order")
    .lean

await Note.findOne({
    userId: profile.id,
    folderId,
    slug: noteSlug,
    type: "note",
  })
    .select("_id userId title slug folderId content contentText visibility shareId publicHtml publicMarkdown publicToc createdAt updatedAt publishedAt")
    .lean

await Note.findOne({ shareId: normalizedShareId, type: "note" })
    .select("_id userId title slug folderId content contentText visibility shareId publicHtml publicMarkdown publicToc createdAt updatedAt publishedAt")
    .lean

await User.findById(note.userId)
    .select("_id username name displayName avatarUrl bio isPublicProfile publishedAt")
    .lean

await Folder.find({ userId: toId(note.userId) })
        .select("_id name slug parentId order")
        .lean
